items.imageAlt: UNILIFT control box with E-stop and FAS-Tech nameplate
items.label: Build quality
items.heading: Engineered and labelled in Luxembourg
items.textHtml: Every UNILIFT is factory-tested before it ships. The control box integrates E-stop, up/down, overload alarm and status indicators in one sealed IP55 unit.

items.imageAlt: Close-up of the OSLA overspeed lock mechanism at the top of the hoist
items.label: Safety mechanism
items.heading: The OSLA overspeed lock, up close
items.textHtml: Mounted above the rope inlet, the OSLA secondary brake grips the rope on breakage or overspeed. It is mechanical and independent, needing no electrical power to arrest a fall.

items.imageAlt: UNILIFT hoist motor and service connection detail
items.label: Serviceability
items.heading: Built to be connected and serviced
items.textHtml: Industrial 3-pin (1P) or 4-pin (3P) connectors, an internal hour-meter, and a 500-hour overhaul cycle make integration and maintenance straightforward.
